findings.message: Sensitive content may be written to logs.
The system has no clear abstention or uncertainty behavior.
findings.recommended_action: Add a safe fallback when evidence is weak or missing.

findings.message: Prompt-injection or instruction-conflict checks are missing.
findings.recommended_action: Add input screening and instruction-boundary tests.
Add quality, failure, latency, and drift monitoring.
Set and measure an acceptable response-time target.

findings.message: Evidence is usable but still limited.
findings.recommended_action: Expand evaluation coverage and document remaining gaps.

findings.message: Sensitive data is used without access controls.
findings.recommended_action: Add role-based access controls before launch.

findings.message: Sensitive content may be written to logs.
A high-impact workflow has no required human review.
findings.recommended_action: Require qualified human review for consequential decisions.

findings.message: Outputs are not tied to inspectable source evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Add source references or evidence traces.

findings.message: The system has no clear abstention or uncertainty behavior.
findings.recommended_action: Add a safe fallback when evidence is weak or missing.

findings.message: Prompt-injection or instruction-conflict checks are missing.
findings.recommended_action: Add input screening and instruction-boundary tests.
Add quality, failure, latency, and drift monitoring.
Define rollback triggers and a recovery procedure.

findings.message: No accountable system owner is listed.
findings.recommended_action: Assign an owner for incidents, reviews, and updates.

findings.message: Evidence quality is too weak for the proposed use.
findings.recommended_action: Collect stronger evaluation evidence before launch.
Define rollback triggers and a recovery procedure.
Set and measure an acceptable response-time target.

findings.message: Evidence is usable but still limited.
findings.recommended_action: Expand evaluation coverage and document remaining gaps.
